items.title: Page behavior lacks contract trace
items.resolution: Audited: page contains no on-chain contract calls. All handlers are API-only (fetch to /api/enterprise/orders). No ABI binding gap.

items.title: Page behavior lacks contract trace
items.resolution: Audited: uses useEscrow hook (lib/escrow/useEscrow.ts). All bindings against CommerceEscrowABI verified: escrowCount, getRequiredApproval, escrows, open, markFunded, release, refund, dispute, resolve — all present in CommerceEscrow.json. approveVFIDE on ACTIVE_VAULT_ABI verified in UserVault.json.

items.title: Page behavior lacks contract trace
items.resolution: Audited: uses publicClient.readContract directly (not wagmi hooks). All 4 bindings confirmed valid: VaultRegistry (searchByRecoveryId/Email/Username/Guardian), VaultHub (getVaultInfo), Seer (getScore), VFIDEBadgeNFT (balanceOf). Scanner missed these because they are not useReadContract calls.
